title: scrophularia scopolii
intro: Scrophularia scopolii, also known as Figwort or Scopolia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing sore throats. Scrophularia scopolii is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine for centuries.
